name: require
summary: Checks that the version of Therion in use is at least <version> and stops with an error if not.

arguments.raw: <version> = The minimum supported Therion version in the form major[.minor[.patch]], e.g. 6.3.
arguments.name: <version>
arguments.description: The minimum supported Therion version in the form major[.minor[.patch]], e.g. 6.3.
